name: hormozi-os
description: The complete Hormozi business OS — four independently installable plugins that operationalize $100M Offers, $100M Leads, ACQ Scale, and $100M Money Models across Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini, and any OpenAI-compatible LLM.

plugins.name: hormozi-offers
plugins.description: Score, build, name, and proof-stack Grand Slam Offers using the $100M Offers framework

plugins.name: hormozi-leads
plugins.description: Build lead gen systems, lead magnets, market analyses, and hooks using the $100M Leads framework

plugins.name: hormozi-scale
plugins.description: Audit bottlenecks, calculate LTV:CAC, hire correctly, and build systems using the ACQ scaling framework

plugins.name: hormozi-money
plugins.description: Select revenue models, architect pricing, optimize LTV, and apply More/Better/New using the $100M Money Models framework
